item.title: cloud-hypervisor / cloud-hypervisor
item.description:
Desc: A Virtual Machine Monitor for modern Cloud workloads. Features include CPU, memory and device hotplug, support for running Windows and Linux guests, device offload with vhost-user and a minimal compact footprint. Written in Rust with a strong focus on security.
Lang: Rust
Star: 2838

item.title: lancedb / lance
item.description:
Desc: Modern columnar data format for ML and LLMs implemented in Rust. Convert from parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, with more integrations coming..
Lang: Rust
Star: 2352
